title: LabForge TD
subtitle: STEM TOWER DEFENCE
tagline: Defend the future of research with science, not weapons.
description: 3D tower defence where every tower teaches a STEM concept. Stop pathogens with UV light, deflect radiation bursts with magnetic fields, balance energy supply with solar arrays. Mars Greenhouse Defence is mission one. More labs unlock as you level up.

classShowcase.name: SOLAR ARRAY
classShowcase.bio: Powers nearby towers. Tilt and dust efficiency in v1.1.

classShowcase.name: UV STERILISER
classShowcase.bio: UV light disrupts DNA. Devastating to spores and bacteria.

classShowcase.name: MAGNETIC EMITTER
classShowcase.bio: Deflects charged particles. The only counter to solar storms.

classShowcase.name: CARBON FILTER
classShowcase.bio: Activated carbon adsorption. Coming in v1.1.

classShowcase.name: BATTERY BANK
classShowcase.bio: Absorbs surges, prevents brown-outs. Coming in v1.1.

classShowcase.name: AI PATTERN CORE
classShowcase.bio: Learns from prior waves; cyber-vulnerable. Coming in v1.2.

achievements.name: MARS HOLDFAST
achievements.desc: Clear all 5 waves of the Mars Greenhouse mission.

achievements.name: FIELD INTEGRITY
achievements.desc: Allow zero radiation bursts to reach the greenhouse.

achievements.name: GRID DISCIPLINE
achievements.desc: Win the mission without ever entering a brown-out.

achievements.name: EFFICIENT DEFENCE
achievements.desc: Win with 6 or fewer towers placed.

changelog.summary: First alpha. Mars Greenhouse Defence playable end-to-end with 3 towers, 3 enemy types, 5 waves.
highlights: Three.js r171 vanilla ES modules — no bundler, no build step
Tower placement on 16×10 grid with path occlusion
Energy economy: solar arrays generate, attack towers consume; brown-out if banked energy hits zero
Live STEM tooltip on every tower explains the concept
